events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: missing field-side surge protection is an installed-defective, non-compliant condition at rough-complete stage — this fails inspection (high risk) because it leaves the loop exposed to transient/lightning damage and doesn't match the loop drawing's protective device callouts (per ISA 5.1 loop documentation intent). Corrective actions center on installing the missing surge protection devices, verifying grounding/bonding, and re-running the loop check before sign-off.
